settings.heading: Fits true to body.
settings.intro: Measure around your natural waist - just above the hips, snug not tight. If you prefer a looser fit, size up.
settings.fit_body: Signal styles sit closer and more athletic. Sculpt styles feel slightly more relaxed through the hip.
settings.measure_body: Wrap the tape just above the hips. Keep it snug, not tight. Measurements may vary ±1 inch (±2.5 cm) due to fabric stretch and manual measurement.
settings.table_intro: The chart below is the standard fit reference for the underwear range.
settings.tops_body: ED tees and sleeveless tops are offered from S to 2XL. Use the product page size selector for the exact size availability on each colour.
settings.signal_body: Y Brief, X Brief, and X Boxer Trunk sit close to the body with a more athletic shape. Size up if you are between sizes.
settings.sculpt_body: V Brief, W Boxer Trunk, and H Boxer Trunk feel soft and slightly more relaxed through the hip. True to size for most.
settings.footer_heading: Use the chart, then follow the feel.
settings.footer_body: If you are between sizes, choose the closer fit for Signal or the roomier fit for Sculpt. The product page also carries the same reference.
